markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final sync on launch readiness, focusing on billing, data, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Billing Logic:** The Business plan is now "Contact Sales." GrowthX customers will be moved from "unlimited" to "Pro" to align with the new pricing model.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Data Cadence:** Probing will shift to every other day to cut costs. Jose is resolving how to display trendlines with missing data points, exploring options like omitting days or using trailing averages.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Performance:** Pedro optimized the Sources page query from \~9s to 2.5s by adding missing indexes, significantly improving user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [**Process:** Leonardo will now conduct a final sanity review of all completed tasks before release, acting as a second pair of eyes.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Topics

### Billing & Plan Management

  - [**Business Plan:** Now "Contact Sales" only, preventing self-service upgrades.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**UI:** Button opens a pre-filled email to the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**GrowthX Customer Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Action:** Move all GrowthX customers from "unlimited" to "Pro" plan.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with the new pricing model.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Ticket:** Estevão will create a ticket to perform this migration and build an admin action for future use.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Backfill Logic for Upgrades:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [**Problem:** Upgrading a workspace triggers a data backfill, which could cause performance issues if many users upgrade simultaneously.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [**Solution:** Implement a new `free_to_pro_upgrade` backfill type.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
          - [**Trigger:** Immediately upon a user clicking the "Pro" upgrade button.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
          - [**Logic:** Only backfill data for the missing 14-day gap (from 45 days to 14 days) if the workspace is newer than the standard backfill period.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

### Data Cadence & Trendline Display

  - [**Problem:** Shifting to every-other-day probing to cut costs will create data gaps, breaking the current trendline display logic which assumes daily snapshots.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Proposed Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
    1.  [**Omit Missing Days:** Let the `recharts` library handle the gaps by connecting the available data points.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
    2.  [**Trailing Average:** Display a 7-day trailing average, a method preferred by Marcel for smoothing data.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
    3.  [**Probe Daily, Display by Plan:** Probe daily and use plan tiers to limit data visibility (e.g., Free plan sees every-other-day data, Pro plan sees daily). This creates an upgrade path but increases costs.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Decision:** Jose will research the best approach and consult Daniel on the cost implications of daily probing.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)

### Performance & Bug Fixes

  - [**Sources Page Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
      - [**Problem:** The slowest query on the Sources page was taking \~9 seconds.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
      - [**Solution:** Pedro added missing indexes, identified with help from Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
      - [**Result:** Query time reduced to 2–2.5 seconds, significantly improving page load speed.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [**Prompt Index Table Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [**Problem:** The backfill for new group metrics (1.5M records) is running slowly.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**Solution:** Jose will pivot from individual record processing to a faster, batched backfill method.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**Other Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Rounding:** Numbers now round consistently (0 decimals everywhere except the overview page, which uses 1).](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Counts:** Fixed incorrect counts on the prompts page and ensured they update correctly after activating/retiring prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**UI:** Added a tooltip to the prompt stage selector to clarify that library prompts can be changed.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Release Review Process

  - [**Goal:** Add a final sanity check before release without creating process overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [**New Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
      - [**Devs:** Tag Leonardo in the comments of completed tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
      - [**Leonardo:** Filters by his tag, reviews the work, and moves the ticket to "Done."](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This provides a second pair of eyes for quality assurance while keeping the process lightweight, especially for minor UI fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Create ticket to migrate GrowthX customers to the Pro plan.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Build an admin action for future customer plan changes.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Implement the `free_to_pro_upgrade` backfill logic.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [Refine the onboarding UI.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [Pivot to the batched method for the prompt index table backfill.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [Research and decide on the best trendline display method for the new probing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Consult Daniel on the cost implications of daily vs. every-other-day probing.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [Continue working on P1 tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [**Leonardo:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
      - [Begin the final sanity review of completed tasks using the new tagging process.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
      - [Sync with Stevie to coordinate review efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [**All Devs:**](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
      - [Tag Leonardo in ticket comments upon completion.](https://fathom.video/share/yL1di7AsU8xx4nyjmR_q4UkpbSFHM14G?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
